name: AI Drama Review
description: AI-driven drama/film compliance review and analysis skill. Detects copyright infringement, age rating violations, and unauthorized novel adaptations in AI-generated short drama scripts. Uses a two-layer architecture combining local keyword scanning with AI-powered deep semantic analysis.
review: Comprehensive AI-driven compliance checking tool for short drama scripts. Provides multi-dimensional analysis including copyright infringement detection using triple similarity algorithms (n-gram Jaccard, edit distance, TF-IDF), age rating compliance scanning, and adaptation detection using dynamic programming. Well-documented bilingual SKILL.md with clear phased execution model. Beta stage with graceful local-only fallback when API keys unavailable. Highly unique and useful for content creators managing compliance risks.
